about.title: Engineered for Architecture
about.description: Woodland is a premium manufacturer of architectural-grade plywood, supplying specifiers, contractors, and export distributors in over 42 global markets.
about.legacyDescription: Since 1974, Woodland has operated at the intersection of forestry science and industrial design—producing substrates that architects and engineers trust.

eco.title: Eco-Certified
eco.description: FSC & PEFC certified timber from responsibly managed forests.

precision.title: Precision Milling
precision.description: 0.1mm tolerance control across all production lines.

quality.title: Quality Lab
quality.description: 24-point in-house testing protocol for every batch.

logistics.title: Global Logistics
logistics.description: Direct export to 42+ markets with full customs documentation.

cta.title: Ready to Source Premium Plywood?
cta.subtitle: Contact our export team for pricing, samples, and technical documentation.

hero.title: Architecturally Defined
hero.subtitle: Est. 1974
hero.description: From raw material to masterpiece — precision-engineered plywood for global architecture.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: To be the world's most trusted architectural timber brand — where material science meets design ambition.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: We manufacture precision-engineered plywood substrates that enable architects to realise bold, lasting structures with sustainable materials.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.description: FSC & PEFC certified. Carbon-tracked supply chain.

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: GRADE A+ production with 24-point QA protocol.

1974.title: Founding Roots
1974.description: Established as a regional sawmill in the Pacific Northwest, Woodland began with a vision to supply premium-grade softwood to local architects.

1998.title: Global Reach
1998.description: Woodland expanded operations to serve international markets, establishing distribution networks across Europe and Asia-Pacific.

2024.title: Digital Precision
2024.description: Launched AI-driven quality inspection and real-time supply chain tracking for all global export orders.

hero.title: Architectural Timber
